# SSH(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  ssh — secure shell client

## SYNOPSIS
  ssh [OPTIONS] [ARGS]

## DESCRIPTION
Connect to a remote server over encrypted channel.

## OPTIONS
  -i key  use identity file
  -p port  custom port
  -L  local port forward

## EXAMPLES
  ssh ghost@nexus-corp.local
  ssh -i id_rsa root@dark-node
  ssh -p 2222 user@host

## ENVIRONMENT
  Terminal Depths v1.0 — cyberpunk hacking simulation

## SEE ALSO
  help, man, commands
